name: FlowChart

aliases.name: Model
aliases.type: { position : FlowChart.Types.Vector2, nodes : Dict.Dict String.String FlowChart.Types.FCNode, links : Dict.Dict String.String Link.Model, currentlyDragging : DraggableTypes.DraggableTypes, dragState : Utils.Draggable.DragState, nodeMap : String.String -> Html.Html FlowChart.Msg }

values.name: addNode
values.comment: call to add node to canvas

name: FlowChart.Types
comment:
# Defination

@docs Vector2, FCNode, FCPort, FCLink, FCCanvas

aliases.name: FCCanvas
aliases.comment: Canvas data to initialize the flowchart
aliases.type: { nodes : List.List FlowChart.Types.FCNode, position : FlowChart.Types.Vector2, links : List.List FlowChart.Types.FCLink }

aliases.name: FCLink
aliases.comment:
Link data to connect nodes through ports

id -> Id of the link, should be unique
from -> NodeId, portId of the start of link
to -> NodeId, portId of the end of link
aliases.type: { id : String.String, from : { nodeId : String.String, portId : String.String }, to : { nodeId : String.String, portId : String.String } }

aliases.name: FCNode
aliases.comment: Represent the data of a single node in flowchart
aliases.type: { id : String.String, position : FlowChart.Types.Vector2, dim : FlowChart.Types.Vector2, nodeType : String.String, ports : List.List FlowChart.Types.FCPort }

aliases.name: FCPort
aliases.comment: Nodes are connected through links at Port position

aliases.name: Vector2
aliases.comment:
Vector2 which can represent position or dimension of node, canvas, etc.

        pos = Vector2 10 10
